k10_system_recap: >>> RECAP: The dark mage Xaroth attacked Eldenrath with devastating force. The village burned. Only one companion could be saved in the crisis. In battle, Xaroth was driven back but fled with a warning: 'My master will find you.' Eldenrath lies in ruins. Aldric struggles with the temptation to use forbidden time rift magic. A.R.I.A. watches silently as the circle begins to close.
k10_protag_morning: The morning after. The sun rises over what was once Eldenrath. It smells of ash and... defiance.
k10_luna_dawn: Dawn brings light, at least. The darkness last night was suffocating... But the survivors are breathing. That's all that matters.
k10_vex_rebuild: Listen up! Walls can be rebuilt. Houses too. But the will to carry on - no one can take that from us. Let's get to work!
k10_protag_rally: I'm going to find Xaroth. He left a trail, and I'll follow it to the ends of the earth. Who's with me?
k10_aria_ready: I'm ready. My analysis shows his energy signature heading northeast. He can't hide.
k10_kael_finish: You're still asking? After what he did to us? I won't let him do this to anyone else. Ever.
k10_aldric_calculations: My calculations show a convergence point. Dark energy is gathering there. If he's anywhere, that's where.
k10_system_trail: >>> Energy trail tracking initiated. Xaroth's signature: Northeastern wilderness, 47km. Residual dark energy marks the path. Warning: Signature strength increases with distance, not decreases. He is regenerating.
k10_protag_pursuit: He's regenerating on the move... Then we can't waste any time. Forward!
k10_aria_trail_strong: The trail is getting stronger. He didn't even try to conceal it. Either he's arrogant... or it's a trap.
k10_kael_careful: Trap or not - we have no choice. But let's at least walk in with our eyes open.
k10_protag_fortress: There... A fortress. In the middle of nowhere. The walls are black stone, and the air itself seems to tremble.
k10_aldric_dark_magic: The magic here is so dense it's almost tangible. My skin is tingling. This is ancient, forbidden magic - older than anything in my books.
k10_system_fortress: >>> Fortress analysis: Massive concentration of dark energy. Structural integrity maintained by magic. Age: Indeterminate. Warning: Magical guardian presences detected.
k10_xaroth_waiting: So you actually made it this far. Impressive. And at the same time, so incredibly foolish.
k10_protag_end_this: Xaroth! This time there's no escape. What you did to Eldenrath - you will answer for it.
k10_xaroth_should_have_fled: You should have run. Far, far away. Now... you will die here with me. Or worse.
k10_xaroth_on_knees: Im... impossible... How can you... be this strong? This wasn't... This wasn't supposed to happen...
k10_protag_its_over: It's over, Xaroth. Your darkness has lost.
k10_aria_what_now: He's defeated, but... What do we do with him now?
k10_system_fate: >>> FATE CHOICE DETECTED. This decision will carry consequences far beyond this moment.
k10_choice_kill: He destroyed our home. He deserves no mercy.
k10_choice_spare: Take him prisoner. We're not like him - we don't kill the defenseless.
k10_protag_kill: For Eldenrath. For everyone you killed. For everyone you took from me.
k10_xaroth_death: Ha... You think this changes anything? My death... is only the beginning. The darkness... never dies...
k10_system_dark_release: >>> WARNING: Massive energy release upon subject's death. Dark energy is not dissipating - it's converging. Target: Unknown. This is... concerning.
k10_luna_dark_energy: Can you feel that? The darkness flowing from him... It's not going away. It's going to someone. To something.
k10_protag_spare: No. We're better than that. You'll stand trial, Xaroth. The survivors of Eldenrath deserve justice, not vengeance.
k10_xaroth_spare_react: Mercy...? How naive. How wonderfully naive. You have no idea what you're protecting me from.
k10_kael_disagree: You're sparing him?! After everything?! He turned our village to ash! Children lost their parents!
k10_xaroth_warning: You don't know what you're doing. When my master comes - and he WILL come - you'll wish you had killed me. Because what's coming... is worse than death.
k10_system_anomaly_surge: >>> CRITICAL ALERT: Unknown energy anomaly detected! Signature matches NO known category. Correction: Partial match with... Prologue signature 'Nihilus'. Match: 34%. This is an echo. A promise.
k10_nihilus_vision: How amusing. Little heroes who think they've won. Savor this moment. It will be the last of its kind. We will meet again.
k10_protag_nihilus_who: What... what was that?! That voice... That cold... My whole body is shaking.
k10_aldric_felt_that: That was no spell. That was a presence. Something unimaginably powerful just... looked at us. From a distance that shouldn't exist.
k10_protag_speech_intro: People of Eldenrath... We survived. We fought. And now... we must decide what comes next.
k10_choice_inspire: We rebuild! Stronger than before! This will not break us!
k10_choice_revenge: They will pay for this. Every last one who stood behind Xaroth. To the very end.
k10_protag_inspire: Look around you! Yes, it lies in ruins. But WE are still standing! And as long as we stand, Eldenrath lives! We will rebuild it - more beautiful, stronger, more alive than ever!
k10_aria_inspired: Look at them... They're crying, but they're smiling. You gave them something stronger than any wall: hope.
k10_luna_hope: I can feel it. The land's pain is receding... There's something new. Something warm. Like a seed breaking through the ash.
k10_protag_revenge: We've suffered enough. Lost enough. From today, we strike back. Not just against Xaroth - against everyone who thinks they can destroy us without consequences!
k10_kael_agrees: THAT'S the language I want to hear! No more whining. No more begging. We take back what's ours - and avenge what was taken from us.
k10_aria_worried: Revenge... I understand the pain behind it. But revenge is a path from which few return.
k10_protag_ending: Whatever comes next - we stand side by side. The past has proven that.
k10_aria_ending: And the future... We write that ourselves. No prophecy. No fate. Our choices.
k10_kael_ending: When the day comes that this darkness returns... it will find us ready.
k10_aldric_ending: There's still so much to understand. The time rifts, the dark energy, that echo... But for the first time, I feel like we can find the answers.
k10_luna_ending: The wounds are healing. Slowly, but they're healing. And I will be there to close every single one.
k10_system_kill_dark: >>> WARNING: Subject eliminated. Dark energy fragmenting into uncontrolled shards. Nihilus signature rising by 12%. Analysis: Death broke the chains, not the darkness.
k10_protag_kill_regret: It had to be done. He would never have stopped. But why... does it feel like I just woke something far worse?
k10_xaroth_spare_info: >>> Subject cooperating. Xaroth providing intel on his master: Nihilus operates through echoes - fragmented consciousness projection across timelines. Xaroth's bond was an anchor. That anchor still exists.
k10_protag_spare_hope: If you're telling the truth, you just earned your life. Help us stop Nihilus - and maybe there's a future for both of us.
k10_system_nihilus_detected: >>> [MAXIMUM PRIORITY] Energy signature detected. Category: Cosmic. Classification: ...World Devourer. Signature strength: Growing exponentially. Estimated arrival: Indeterminate. But he is moving. He is moving toward us.
k10_system_arc2: >>> Arc 2: Shadows of the Past - Coming Soon
